---
title: "RNN"
author: "Yun Tsing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
library(keras3)
library(tensorflow)

df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
```

```{r}

predict_alpha_rnn <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  library(keras3)
  library(caret)
  
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  n_feats  <- length(features)
  pred_year <- max(year(df$caldt))
  
  # Data Splitting
  train_full <- df[year(df$caldt) <  pred_year, ]
  test       <- df[year(df$caldt) == pred_year, ]
  
  n_years    <- sort(unique(year(train_full$caldt)))
  cutoff     <- n_years[floor(length(n_years) * 0.7)]
  tune_train <- train_full[year(train_full$caldt) <= cutoff, ]
  tune_val   <- train_full[year(train_full$caldt) >  cutoff, ]
  
  scaler   <- preProcess(as.matrix(tune_train[, features]), method = c("center", "scale"))
  prep_rnn <- function(data) {
    m <- predict(scaler, as.matrix(data[, features]))
    array(m, dim = c(nrow(m), 1, n_feats))
  }
  
  X_train <- prep_rnn(tune_train)
  y_train <- tune_train[[target]]
  X_val   <- prep_rnn(tune_val)
  y_val   <- tune_val[[target]]

  # Hyperparameter grid
  grid <- expand.grid(
    units = c(32, 64),
    dropout = c(0, 0.2),
    lr = c(0.01, 0.001)
  )
  
  grid$mse <- sapply(1:nrow(grid), function(i) {
    p <- grid[i, ]
    
    model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
      layer_lstm(
        units = p$units, 
        dropout = p$dropout,        
        input_shape = c(1, n_feats)
      ) |>
      layer_dense(units = 1)
    
    model |> compile(
      optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = p$lr),
      loss = "mse"
    )
    
    model |> fit(
      X_train, y_train, 
      epochs = 30, 
      batch_size = 64, 
      verbose = 0,
      validation_data = list(X_val, y_val),
      callbacks = list(callback_early_stopping(patience = 5))
    )
    
    val_preds <- model |> predict(X_val, verbose = 0)
    mean((y_val - val_preds)^2)
  })

  best <- grid[which.min(grid$mse), ]
  
  # Refit for final model
  X_full <- prep_rnn(train_full)
  y_full <- train_full[[target]]
  
  final_model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
    layer_lstm(units = best$units, dropout = best$dropout, input_shape = c(1, n_feats)) |>
    layer_dense(units = 1)
  
  final_model |> compile(optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = best$lr), loss = "mse")
  final_model |> fit(X_full, y_full, epochs = 20, batch_size = 64, verbose = 0)
  
  X_test <- prep_rnn(test)
  preds  <- final_model |> predict(X_test, verbose = 0)
  
  return(data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha = as.numeric(preds)
  ))
}
```

```{r}

result <- predict_alpha_rnn(df)

```
